SAN FRANCISCO, CALIF. 94105-2230
50 FREMONT STREET
NINETEENTH FLOOR
TELEPHONE (415) 979-1900
FAX (415) 979-1901

COLORADO & WEST VIRGINIA

APR 01 1991

March 27, 1991


Mr. Wayne Imberi
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA  95804-0807

RE: STATEMENT OF ECONOMIC INTERESTS FOR DESIGNATED EMPLOYEES
    FORM 730

Dear Mr. Imberi:

     I spoke with you briefly over the phone, earlier this week.
As I mentioned to you, we received the Form 730 last year and
prepared a letter to your office at that time, that outlined our
basis for exemption.  We feel that the service Mullen & Filippi
provide for the Madera/Mariposa County Schools' Self-Insured
Authority fall outside of the scope of this Act.

     Mullen & Filippi defends the Madera/Mariposa County Schools'
Self-Insured Authority in the area of Workers' Compensation Claims.
While the Firm does attempt to resolve each case in the most
beneficial and equitable manner for our client, we do not advise
them with respect to preserve requirements or any other internal
financial matters.

     Please advise me if you require additional information.

                                        Sincerely,
                                        MULLEN & FILIPPI

                                        [signature]

                                        By: Suzanne L. Wilson
                                            Director of Administration

cc: Ms. Cheryl Lara

SLW:vas
